name_en: Premium top-grain leather M23951 Light purple with white Small. This Capucines BB handbag features a beautiful Lovelock braided chain. It connects hand-painted Monogram elements and the LV monogram lock with chain links. Contrasting leather forms the iconic LV logo, exuding an elegant air. Dimensions: 27 × 18 × 9 cm
